text:
Created attachment 227192
"git diff" to update the port

- Update  0.8000 -> 0.8001
- Changes: https://metacpan.org/release/XAOC/ExtUtils-Depends-0.8001/changes

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.0-RELEASE-p3
pkg 1.17.1
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
